---
title: "The Rev. Charles Dyson"
---

## The Rev. Charles Dyson

**Dates:** (1788-24 April 1860)

### Description

Rector of Dogmersfield

### Biography

Known as 'the Simorg', he lived with his wife (who was his cousin) and his much younger half-sister Mary Anne Dyson at Dogmersfield Rectory from 1836.

### Letters

- Letter from January 17, 1894
- Letter from April 21 1857
- Letter from Oct 4th [1852]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
